_description: Curated cloud model catalog for potential multi-provider routing via OpenRouter. Each model maps to a local Ollama equivalent where available.

coding.description: Code generation, completion, and agentic coding tasks

qwen/qwen-2.5-coder-32b-instruct.name: Qwen2.5 Coder 32B Instruct
qwen/qwen-2.5-coder-32b-instruct.notes: Exact cloud match for local qwen2.5-coder:32b

qwen/qwen3-coder.name: Qwen3 Coder 480B A35B
qwen/qwen3-coder.notes: Massive upgrade over local 32B — agentic tool calling, 262K context

qwen/qwen3-coder-30b-a3b-instruct.name: Qwen3 Coder 30B A3B Instruct
qwen/qwen3-coder-30b-a3b-instruct.notes: Efficient small MoE coder, instruction-tuned without thinking mode

mistralai/codestral-2508.name: Mistral Codestral 2508
mistralai/codestral-2508.notes: Specializes in FIM, code correction, test generation

mistralai/devstral-2512.name: Mistral Devstral 2 2512
mistralai/devstral-2512.notes: Best value — 256K context, multi-file codebase exploration

mistralai/devstral-small.name: Mistral Devstral Small 1.1
mistralai/devstral-small.notes: 53.6% SWE-Bench — runs on single 4090 or Apple Silicon

mistralai/devstral-medium.name: Mistral Devstral Medium
mistralai/devstral-medium.notes: 61.6% SWE-Bench — beats Gemini 2.5 Pro and GPT-4.1 on code tasks

qwen/qwq-32b.name: Qwen QwQ 32B
qwen/qwq-32b.notes: Reasoning-first coder — competitive with DeepSeek R1, good for hard problems

reasoning.description: Deep reasoning, chain-of-thought, and prompt enhancement

deepseek/deepseek-r1-0528.name: DeepSeek R1 0528
deepseek/deepseek-r1-0528.notes: Full R1 — local deepseek-r1:latest is 8B distill, this is 84x larger

deepseek/deepseek-r1-distill-qwen-32b.name: DeepSeek R1 Distill Qwen 32B
deepseek/deepseek-r1-distill-qwen-32b.notes: Best distill — outperforms o1-mini, runnable locally on 24GB VRAM

deepseek/deepseek-r1-distill-qwen-14b.name: DeepSeek R1 Distill Qwen 14B
deepseek/deepseek-r1-distill-qwen-14b.notes: Smaller distill — still beats o1-mini, could run locally on 16GB

deepseek/deepseek-v3.2.name: DeepSeek V3.2
deepseek/deepseek-v3.2.notes: Hybrid reasoning — toggle thinking on/off, IMO/IOI gold medal results

deepseek/deepseek-chat-v3.1.name: DeepSeek V3.1
deepseek/deepseek-chat-v3.1.notes: Chat-optimized with tool calling, code agents, search agents

general.description: General chat, instruction following, and lightweight tasks

meta-llama/llama-3.3-70b-instruct.name: Meta Llama 3.3 70B Instruct
meta-llama/llama-3.3-70b-instruct.notes: Upgraded local llama3.2 — 8 languages, strong general performance

meta-llama/llama-4-maverick.name: Meta Llama 4 Maverick
meta-llama/llama-4-maverick.notes: Latest Llama — 1M context, native multimodal, 128 experts

meta-llama/llama-4-scout.name: Meta Llama 4 Scout
meta-llama/llama-4-scout.notes: Efficient Llama 4 — multimodal, 327K context, runs locally

mistralai/mistral-small-3.1-24b-instruct.name: Mistral Small 3.1 24B
mistralai/mistral-small-3.1-24b-instruct.notes: Best value general model — multimodal, 128K context, $0.03/M input

vision.description: Image understanding, visual reasoning, and multimodal tasks

meta-llama/llama-3.2-11b-vision-instruct.name: Meta Llama 3.2 11B Vision
meta-llama/llama-3.2-11b-vision-instruct.notes: Cheapest vision — image captioning, VQA, same Llama 3.2 family as local

meta-llama/llama-3.2-90b-vision-instruct.name: Meta Llama 3.2 90B Vision
meta-llama/llama-3.2-90b-vision-instruct.notes: Top Llama vision — handles complex real-time visual analysis

qwen/qwen2.5-vl-32b-instruct.name: Qwen2.5 VL 32B Instruct
qwen/qwen2.5-vl-32b-instruct.notes: Same Qwen2.5 family as local coder — adds vision, OCR, video

qwen/qwen2.5-vl-72b-instruct.name: Qwen2.5 VL 72B Instruct
qwen/qwen2.5-vl-72b-instruct.notes: Flagship Qwen vision — charts, icons, graphics, layouts

qwen/qwen3-vl-32b-instruct.name: Qwen3 VL 32B Instruct
qwen/qwen3-vl-32b-instruct.notes: Next-gen Qwen vision — 262K context, OCR in 32 languages, agentic

google/gemini-2.5-flash.name: Google Gemini 2.5 Flash
google/gemini-2.5-flash.notes: 1M context, thinking mode, prompt cache — best multimodal workhorse

premium.description: Frontier models for complex agentic workflows and maximum quality

anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.5.name: Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4.5
anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.5.notes: SWE-bench leader, agentic tool orchestration, parallel execution

anthropic/claude-opus-4.name: Anthropic Claude Opus 4
anthropic/claude-opus-4.notes: World's best coding model at release — hours of sustained agentic work

openai/gpt-4.1.name: OpenAI GPT-4.1
openai/gpt-4.1.notes: 1M context, 54.6% SWE-bench, optimized for code diffs and agents

openai/gpt-4.1-mini.name: OpenAI GPT-4.1 Mini
openai/gpt-4.1-mini.notes: Best value premium — GPT-4o performance at lower cost, 1M context

google/gemini-2.5-pro.name: Google Gemini 2.5 Pro
google/gemini-2.5-pro.notes: #1 LMArena — thinking mode, prompt cache, 1M context

qwen/qwen3-4b-2507.note: Default enhancement model — cloud upgrade is Llama 3.3 70B, equivalent is Mistral Small 24B (both free tier)

qwen/qwen3-4b-thinking-2507.note: Orchestrator / thinking model — cloud upgrade is full DeepSeek R1 671B, equivalent is R1 14B distill
